current_plan: Two-pronged approach: (1) Extend LMP to depths 7 and 8 with limits 50 and 65 respectively, to prune more moves at medium depths. (2) Tighten LMP at depth 1 from 5 to 4, since with good move ordering the first 4 moves cover 95%+ of best moves at depth 1. These are safe 'prune more moves' changes that follow the proven strategy from experiment #7. No changes to reduction amounts, no changes to LMR/null move formulas.
